sections.paragraph:
ἐφικνέομαι 2 aor. ἐφικόμην (ἱκνέομαι ‘come’; Hom. et al.; IPriene 105, 47; Sir 43:27 cod. C; SibOr 11, 215; Just., D. 4, 2 ἐφικτόν) to arrive at or come to someth., come to, reach εἴς τινα someone 2 Cor 10:14. ἄχρι τινός as far as someone vs. 13.—DELG s.v. ἵκω.

aor. aor. = aorist

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et et al. = et alii (and others)

IPriene IPriene = Die Inschriften von Priene—List 3

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

someth. someth. = something

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 418
